onboarding.subtitle: Your personal manga & book library
onboarding.slide1Desc: Add manga from any website with a single URL
onboarding.slide2Desc: Mark chapters as read and track your progress

library.title: Library
library.emptyAction: Paste a URL to add your first manga

bookDetail.deleteConfirmMessage: This book and its chapters will be removed from your library.

profile.title: Profile
profile.signOutConfirm: Do you want to sign out from this device?
profile.signOutError: Could not sign out right now.
profile.deleteAccountConfirm: This action permanently deletes your account and your synced metadata.

legal.privacyIntro: Yomiru stores account data, reading status and source URLs to keep your library synced.
legal.privacyDataCollected: We collect profile data (email, name, language), library metadata and reading progress.
legal.privacyUsage: Data is used to authenticate users, sync your library and provide chapter retrieval.
legal.privacyStorage: Offline chapter downloads are saved locally on your device. Auto-cache expires after 24 hours.
legal.privacyDeletion: You can delete your account from Profile > Delete account. This removes your synced server data.
legal.privacyContact: If you need support, contact the app publisher using the support channel listed in the store profile.
legal.termsIntro: By using Yomiru, you agree to use the app in compliance with local laws and platform policies.
legal.termsUsage: You are responsible for the URLs you import and how you use third-party sources.
legal.termsSources: Source availability, quality and access restrictions may change without prior notice.
legal.termsAccount: You are responsible for your account credentials and activity under your account.
legal.termsLiability: The app is provided as-is. Service interruptions and source-side failures can occur.
legal.termsContact: For legal or support requests, use the support contact provided in the app store listing.

reader.title: Reader
reader.noContent: No readable content could be extracted for this chapter.
